title: lepidium desertorum
intro: Lepidium desertorum, also known as cress or desert cress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family, Brassicaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Lepidium desertorum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often consumed as a tea, added to salads, or used in traditional remedies, with its seeds and leaves being the most commonly used parts.
